mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(L.reg_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS monthly, -- reg_date를 ORDER_DATE로 변경 SUM(D.price * D.quantity) AS total_sales FROM order_detail D INNER JOIN order_list_map L ON D.order_id = L.order_id WHERE (L.reg_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -5), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(SYSDATE)) OR (L.reg_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -17), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12))) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(L.reg_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY monthly ASC

SELECT o.order_id, o.member_id, m.member_email,
( SELECT SUM(d.price * d.quantity) FROM order_detail d WHERE d.order_id = o.order_id ) AS total_price,
s.store_name, o.order_status AS order_status, m.member_thumb FROM order_tbl o JOIN member_tbl m ON o.member_id = m.member_id JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
SELECT d.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_image, d.option_string, d.quantity FROM order_detail d JOIN menu_tbl m ON d.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId}
